FFlagAudioDiscoveryMigrateToActions_Stag.purpose: Improves the way players discover and interact with audio, making it more user-friendly.

FFlagAppChatEnableFormFactor_Staged.mechanism: Adapts chat features to different device types (like mobile or desktop).
FFlagAppChatEnableFormFactor_Staged.purpose: Ensures players have a seamless chat experience regardless of the device they are using.

FFlagPTFControllerLayoutSupport.mechanism: Adds support for specific controller layouts in games.
FFlagPTFControllerLayoutSupport.purpose: Allows players to use their preferred controller setups, enhancing comfort and gameplay.

FIntBulkPurchaseMaxLineItems.mechanism: Sets the maximum number of items that can be purchased in a single transaction.
FIntBulkPurchaseMaxLineItems.purpose: Allows players to buy more items at once, making shopping faster and easier.

DFFlagMigrateTriangleMeshPart.mechanism: Switches to a new system for handling triangle mesh parts in games.
DFFlagMigrateTriangleMeshPart.purpose: Improves the performance and visual quality of 3D objects in games.

FFlagEnableConsoleExpControls684.mechanism: Activates experimental controls for console users.
FFlagEnableConsoleExpControls684.purpose: Enhances gameplay experience for players using consoles by providing better control options.

DFIntNetStackDummyClientConnectResultPoi.mechanism: Limits the number of connection attempts a client can make to reduce server load.
DFIntNetStackDummyClientConnectResultPoi.purpose: Ensures smoother gameplay by preventing connection issues during high traffic times.

FFlagStatsItemRenameLanguage_Staged.mechanism: Allows items to be renamed based on the player's language settings.
FFlagStatsItemRenameLanguage_Staged.purpose: Makes it easier for players to understand item names in their preferred language.

DFFlagHttpClientLocalThrottleMoreStatus.mechanism: Limits the rate of HTTP requests to reduce server load.
DFFlagHttpClientLocalThrottleMoreStatus.purpose: Improves game performance by preventing lag from too many requests.

FFlagLuaAppUpdateValidateInterfaceLogs.mechanism: Enhances logging for interface updates in the Lua application.
FFlagLuaAppUpdateValidateInterfaceLogs.purpose: Helps developers track and fix issues more effectively.

FFlagLuaAppRemoveEDPLoadingState_Staged.mechanism: Removes a specific loading state in the Lua application.
FFlagLuaAppRemoveEDPLoadingState_Staged.purpose: Speeds up the loading process for players, making games feel more responsive.

FFlagEnableScreenSizeImpressionsTrackerD.mechanism: Tracks screen size impressions by default for analytics.
FFlagEnableScreenSizeImpressionsTrackerD.purpose: Allows developers to optimize games for different screen sizes automatically.

FFlagEnableOnlyAllowAdClicksAfterImpress.mechanism: Restricts ad clicks until after a second impression is shown.
FFlagEnableOnlyAllowAdClicksAfterImpress.purpose: Increases the effectiveness of ads, benefiting both developers and advertisers.

FFlagStyledInstanceContext.mechanism: Enables a new way to manage UI elements with styles.
FFlagStyledInstanceContext.purpose: Improves the look and feel of user interfaces for a better player experience.

DFIntTriangleMeshPartMigrationTelemetryT.mechanism: Tracks performance data during the transition to new mesh parts.
DFIntTriangleMeshPartMigrationTelemetryT.purpose: Helps ensure smoother gameplay by monitoring changes and fixing issues.

FFlagLuauCacheDuplicateHasPropConstraint.mechanism: Optimizes how properties are checked in scripts to avoid redundancy.
FFlagLuauCacheDuplicateHasPropConstraint.purpose: Enhances script performance, leading to faster game loading and smoother gameplay.

FFlagEnableCorescriptExecutionTime.mechanism: Tracks how long core scripts take to run.
FFlagEnableCorescriptExecutionTime.purpose: Allows developers to optimize scripts, improving game responsiveness for players.

DFFlagNetStackDummyClientEnablePingTelem.mechanism: Collects data on network latency for testing purposes.
DFFlagNetStackDummyClientEnablePingTelem.purpose: Helps improve connection quality, resulting in a more stable gaming experience.

FFlagExplorerHandleCoreGuiVisibilityProj.mechanism: Enables project settings to control the visibility of core GUI elements in the Explorer.
FFlagExplorerHandleCoreGuiVisibilityProj.purpose: Allows developers to customize the user interface in their games, improving the overall experience.
